calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-18-2015 Vacated

Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To Plaintiffs "Amendment To Cause Of Action" [Sic], Actually First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mieko Saito, in pro per, Tel. 415.531.0862, for plaintiffs, appearing with Japanese interpreter, Cindy W, Yee;
Marina B. Pitts, of Law Offices of Stubbs & Leone APC, Tel. 925.974.8600, for defendants.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To Plaintiff's "Amendment To Cause Of Action" [Sic], Actually First Amended Complaint is granted without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order and judgment signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARINA B. PITTS OF STUBBS & LEONE, TEL. NO. (925) 974-8600 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To Plaintiff's Complaint is Granted with twenty days leave to amend. None of the claims alleged in the complaint are based on a statute, as required by Government Code section 815. While it appears that plaintiff may not be able to allege any claims for the conduct for which she seeks relief that are based on a statute and for which she satisfied the claims presentation requirement of the Government Code and are not time-barred, at this early stage of the litigation, plaintiff should be given the opportunity to attempt to do so. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Irene L. Tofft, CSR # 12913 =302/hk

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2015 Set For Trial On Oct-13-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
